complex_text: The New York Philharmonic ( officially the Philharmonic-Symphony Society of New York ) is a symphony orchestra based in New York City in the United States . It is one of the American orchestras commonly referred to as the `` Big Five '' .
simple_text: The New York Philharmonic is the oldest symphony orchestra in the United States which still exists , and one of the most famous orchestras of the world .

complex_text: John Fitzgerald `` Jack '' Kennedy ( May 29 , 1917 - November 22 , 1963 ) , often referred to by his initials JFK , was the 35th President of the United States , serving from 1961 until his assassination in 1963 .
simple_text: John Fitzgerald Kennedy ( May 29 , 1917 - November 22 , 1963 ) , also known as JFK , was the 35th president of the United States of America . He was in office from 1961 until he was assassinated ( shot dead ) in 1963 .

complex_text: A testimonial match or testimonial game , often referred to simply as a testimonial , is a practice in some sports , notably football and especially in the United Kingdom , where a club puts on a match in honor of a player for service to the club .
simple_text: A testimonial match is an exhibition game played to raise money for a player who has been with a club for a long time .
